title: joins fail in the presence of nulls
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test1 (id Int32, name String, value Int32);
CREATE TABLE test2 (id Int32, description String, amount Int32);
SELECT test1.name, test1.value, test2.amount FROM test1 LEFT JOIN test2 ON test1.value = test2.amount;
key_bug_features: joins fail when null values are present
